calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Off Calendar

Motion For A Prove Up Hearing; Memo Of P And A
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Rafael S. Climaco, Esq., and Mark Punzalan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Isabel Santos.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Nur Beauty Inc., and Yosef Sofan.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations of Rafael S. Climaco and Mark Punzalan on file.
Plaintiff Isabel Santos sworn and examined on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,851.36
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $9,312.50
Costs: $1,571.76
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,735.62
Judgment signed in open court.
